transcription.text: Safe Flight Repair, Safe Flight Replace. Ooh, that's rough. At least with Safe Flight, you can get that fixed any way you want. Any way I want. I can schedule a chip fix while I get my hair clipped. Yep, they can fix my glass while we fish for bass. If you want. They can recalibrate my safety features while I sit at home in my comfy pants. That one doesn't rhyme, but sure. Get it fixed any way you want at SafeFlight.com. Safe Flight Repair, Safe Flight Replace.
